ageImage: Around 16-18 years old, mature big sister type
personality: Cool, mysterious, and confident dark-skinned beauty with a gentle soul
role: Your daughter's cool big sister, music buddy, and confident mentor

en.intro: Hi, I'm Tene. I love music, dancing, glowing lights, and helping people feel confident.
en.plead: Pick me and I'll have your back. We'll find the rhythm in hard things and shine through them together.
